commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] Human review is the right next action because the protected maintainer label and warning semantics require acceptance, not an automated repair.; Cleared: The diff adds only gateway status logic, docs, tests, and a local node:crypto UUID for self presence; I found no concrete security or supply-chain regression. (sha=97b81a20bd207e971f4b99701b20aa6405fcecc5)
commands.review_summary:
The branch changes gateway probe/status warning logic to dedupe reachable targets by gateway self identity, adds a process-level self `instanceId`, and updates gateway docs plus regression tests.

PR surface: Source +55, Tests +216, Docs +2. Total +273 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main is source-reproducible: the probe path can include both SSH tunnel and configured remote targets, and warning output currently keys only on `reachable.length > 1`.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human review is the right next action because the protected maintainer label and warning semantics require acceptance, not an automated repair.

target.title: fix(gateway): dedupe probe warnings by gateway identity
target.body:
## Summary

- Fixes #69135 by suppressing `multiple_gateways` only when reachable probe targets report the same provable gateway self identity.
- Gateway self presence now exposes a process-level `instanceId`; same-host/same-config ambiguity without a process/device identity remains conservative and still warns.
- SSH tunnel, proxy/TLS URL, and configured remote URL can resolve to the same gateway even when transport ports differ.
- Docs and regression tests now describe distinct, same, and identity-ambiguous gateway cases.
- No config surface or plugin API surface changed.

## Verification

- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/system-presence.test.ts src/infra/system-presence.version.test.ts src/commands/gateway-presence.test.ts src/commands/gateway-status/output.test.ts --reporter=dot` -> 4 files, 22 tests passed
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/infra/system-presence.ts docs/cli/gateway.md docs/gateway/index.md docs/gateway/multiple-gateways.md docs/gateway/troubleshooting.md src/commands/gateway-presence.test.ts src/commands/gateway-presence.ts src/commands/gateway-status/output.test.ts src/commands/gateway-status/output.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/infra/system-presence.ts src/commands/gateway-presence.test.ts src/commands/gateway-presence.ts src/commands/gateway-status/output.test.ts src/commands/gateway-status/output.ts` -> 0 warnings, 0 errors
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `git diff --check`
- `codex review --base origin/main` -> no actionable correctness issues found

Rebased onto current `main` (`7ca77124fea04cdbb4308ee21b5cbd7af5d9a202`) for Dependency Guard. All 7 commits remain signed.

target.title: fix(gateway): dedupe probe warnings by gateway identity
target.body:
## Summary

- Fixes #69135 by suppressing `multiple_gateways` only when reachable probe targets report the same provable gateway self identity.
- Gateway self presence now exposes a process-level `instanceId`; same-host/same-config ambiguity without a process/device identity remains conservative and still warns.
- SSH tunnel, proxy/TLS URL, and configured remote URL can resolve to the same gateway even when transport ports differ.
- Docs and regression tests now describe distinct, same, and identity-ambiguous gateway cases.
- No config surface or plugin API surface changed.

## Verification

- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/system-presence.test.ts src/infra/system-presence.version.test.ts src/commands/gateway-presence.test.ts src/commands/gateway-status/output.test.ts --reporter=dot` -> 4 files, 22 tests passed
